description: Style NoteWe're tired of all the colour pop denims around town. That's why quiksilver comes up with this bright pair of sneakers with a high  fashion sartorial attitude. Inspired from it's sporty counterparts this pair adds a definite down-town cool with an upscale look. Style this with minimalist ensembles for maximum effect. Product DetailsBlack round toed shoes with central lace-ups and perforationsHas a padded tongue and inner with a fabric footbedPU midsole with foxingPatterned TPU outsoleMaterial and CareLeatherUse a leather brush to remove dust
